patch:
--- a/shifter.v
+++ b/shifter.v
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 module barrel_shifter (
   input [15:0] data_in,
   input [3:0] shift_amount,
-  output [15:0] data_out,
+  output [15:0] shifted_data,
   input direction
 );
   assign shifted_data = direction ? (data_in >> shift_amount) : (data_in << shift_amount);
